default.title: Horizon Tech | Sọfitiwia Idawọlẹ, Awọsanma, ati AI
default.description: Horizon Tech ṣe apẹrẹ ati firanṣẹ sọfitiwia ile-iṣẹ, awọn solusan AI, awọn amayederun awọsanma, ati awọn ọja oni-nọmba fun awọn ẹgbẹ ti o ni ifẹkufẹ.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Awọn ọna šiše imọ-ẹrọ ti o ṣe iwọn
home.description: Sọfitiwia idawọlẹ, AI / ML, awọn amayederun awọsanma, ati ifijiṣẹ IoT fun awọn ẹgbẹ agbaye.

about.title: Nipa Horizon Tech | Ile-iṣẹ Iṣẹ ati Ẹgbẹ
about.description: Kọ ẹkọ nipa Horizon Tech, iṣẹ wa, ati bii a ṣe fi awọn solusan imọ-ẹrọ ti o ni ipa giga.

team.title: Ẹgbẹ | Horizon Tech Leadership ati Awọn amoye
team.description: Pade awọn onise-ẹrọ ati awọn oludari ti o kọ sọfitiwia ile-iṣẹ ati awọn iru ẹrọ awọsanma ni Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Awọn iṣẹ | Kọ Pẹlu Horizon Tech
careers.description: Ṣawari awọn ipa ṣiṣi ati dagba iṣẹ rẹ pẹlu ẹgbẹ imọ-ẹrọ Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Kan si Horizon Tech | Bẹrẹ iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ
contact.description: Kan si Horizon Tech lati jiroro iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ, awọn aini imọ-ẹrọ, ati akoko ifijiṣẹ.

caseStudies.title: Awọn iwadi ọran | Awọn abajade Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
caseStudies.description: Ka awọn ijinlẹ ọran alabara ati awọn abajade ti a firanṣẹ nipasẹ Horizon Tech kọja awọn ile-iṣẹ.

blog.title: Bulọọgi | Awọn imọran Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
blog.description: Awọn oye imọ-ẹrọ, awọn ẹkọ ifijiṣẹ, ati itọsọna faaji lati Horizon Tech.

education.title: Ẹkọ | Awọn orisun Ẹkọ Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
education.description: Awọn itọsọna, awọn itọkasi, ati awọn orisun ẹkọ imọ-ẹrọ lati Horizon Tech.

support.title: Atilẹyin | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
support.description: Gba awọn orisun atilẹyin ati awọn aṣayan olubasọrọ fun awọn iṣẹ Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Asiri Afihan | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
privacy.description: Ka eto imulo aṣiri ti Horizon Tech ati awọn adehun aabo data.

terms.title: Awọn ofin ti Iṣẹ | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
terms.description: Ka awọn ofin iṣẹ Horizon Tech fun oju opo wẹẹbu wa ati awọn iṣẹ.

profile.title: Profaili | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
profile.description: Ṣakoso profaili Horizon Tech rẹ, awọn eto, ati awọn alaye akọọlẹ.

firstTimeSetup.title: Iṣeto Akoko Akọkọ | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
firstTimeSetup.description: Pari iṣeto akọọlẹ akọkọ lati tẹsiwaju ni Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Gbagbe Ọrọigbaniwọle | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
forgotPassword.description: Tun iraye si akọọlẹ Horizon Tech rẹ.

resetPassword.title: Tun Ọrọigbaniwọle | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
resetPassword.description: Ṣẹda ọrọ igbaniwọle tuntun fun akọọlẹ Horizon Tech rẹ.

confirmEmail.title: Jẹrisi imeeli | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
confirmEmail.description: Jẹrisi adirẹsi imeeli rẹ lati mu akọọlẹ Horizon Tech rẹ ṣiṣẹ.

admin.title: Igbimọ abojuto | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
admin.description: Isakoso workspace fun Horizon Tech Platform isakoso.

unauthorized.title: Ti ko ni aṣẹ | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
unauthorized.description: Lọwọlọwọ o ko ni iraye si oju-iwe Horizon Tech yii.

services.title: Awọn iṣẹ | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
services.description: Ṣawari awọn iṣẹ Horizon Tech ni imọ-ẹrọ sọfitiwia, AI, awọsanma, DevOps, ati iyipada oni-nọmba.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
innovationLab.description: Wo awọn idanwo Horizon Tech ati awọn apẹẹrẹ ni AI ati imọ-ẹrọ ti a lo.

authCallback.title: Wọlé | Imọ-ẹrọ Horizon
authCallback.description: Pari iforukọsilẹ ti o ni aabo fun akọọlẹ Horizon Tech rẹ.
